meta.question: What's the maximun misalignment of M1 when offloading senor offsets?
meta.finalAnswer:
Based on the M1CS Actuator Range of Travel Budget requirement (REQ-1-OAD-0808), the **maximum total required M1CS actuator travel is 5.00 mm**.

This budget accommodates the following factors:
- Gravity deflection of Telescope Elevation Structure and M1 Optics System: 1.80 mm
- Thermal deflection of Telescope Elevation Structure and M1 Optics System: 0.42 mm
- M1 Subcell installation errors: 0.20 mm
- Added range for actuator diagnostics: 0.25 mm
- End of Travel Margin: 0.20 mm
- Additional Margin: 2.13 mm

The 5.00 mm total represents the maximum misalignment/travel allowance for M1 when offloading sensor offsets and accommodating other operational factors.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("M1"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("misalignment"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("offload"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("offloadSensorOffsets"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("offloadSensorOffsets"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
  FILTER(?prop != vocab:NamedElement_name && ?prop != vocab:MDObject_ID && ?prop != vocab:Element_owner && ?prop != vocab:Element_ownedElement && ?prop != vocab:NamedElement_namespace && ?prop != vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName && ?prop != vocab:PackageableElement_owningPackage && ?prop != vocab:PackageableElement_visibility__from_PackageableElement && ?prop != vocab:Type_package && ?prop != rdf:type)
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("offloadSensorOffsets Cmd"))) 
  ?elem vocab:Signal_ownedAttribute ?attr .
  ?attr ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?attr ?attrName ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?signal vocab:NamedElement_name "offloadSensorOffsets%20Cmd" .
  ?signal vocab:Signal_ownedAttribute ?attr .
  ?attr vocab:NamedElement_name ?attrName .
  ?attr ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

}
LIMIT 50

SELECT ?slot ?definingFeature ?valueLiteral WHERE {

  ?elem vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?slot .
  ?slot rdf:type vocab:slot .

  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueLiteral .
  ?valueLiteral rdf:type vocab:literal%20string .
  ?valueLiteral vocab:LiteralString_value ?val .
}

SELECT ?slot ?definingFeature ?val WHERE {

}

SELECT ?elem ?name ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("M1")) && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("segment")) && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("position")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("M1SegmentsPositions")))
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("M1")) && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("misalignment")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("M1")) && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("budget")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?slot ?definingFeature ?val WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "M1CS%20Actuator%20Range%20of%20Travel%20Budget" .
  ?elem vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?slot .
  ?slot rdf:type vocab:slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?valueLiteral .
  ?valueLiteral rdf:type vocab:literal%20string .
  ?valueLiteral vocab:LiteralString_value ?val .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?definingFeature), "Text"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found the M1CS Actuator Range of Travel Budget requirement which details the actuator travel allowances. The budget shows a total required M1CS actuator travel of 5.00 mm, which includes gravity deflection (1.80 mm), thermal deflection (0.42 mm), M1 subcell installation errors (0.20 mm), actuator diagnostics range (0.25 mm), end of travel margin (0.20 mm), and an additional margin of 2.13 mm. This represents the maximum misalignment/travel budget for M1 when accommodating sensor offsets and other factors.

request.answer:
Based on the M1CS Actuator Range of Travel Budget requirement (REQ-1-OAD-0808), the **maximum total required M1CS actuator travel is 5.00 mm**.

This budget accommodates the following factors:
- Gravity deflection of Telescope Elevation Structure and M1 Optics System: 1.80 mm
- Thermal deflection of Telescope Elevation Structure and M1 Optics System: 0.42 mm
- M1 Subcell installation errors: 0.20 mm
- Added range for actuator diagnostics: 0.25 mm
- End of Travel Margin: 0.20 mm
- Additional Margin: 2.13 mm

The 5.00 mm total represents the maximum misalignment/travel allowance for M1 when offloading sensor offsets and accommodating other operational factors.
